description: Introduce a full relational hydration read compiler in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans` that replaces the root-only compilation model. Acceptance: for every `RelationalResourceModel` with `StorageKind.RelationalTables`, compile a `ResourceReadPlan` with one `TableReadPlan` per table in `TablesInDependencyOrder`, preserve dependency order exactly, and keep `ReferenceIdentityProjectionPlansInDependencyOrder` and `DescriptorProjectionPlansInOrder` present but empty for story 05.
steps-to-verify: Add or update unit tests in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit` proving root, child, nested collection, and `_ext` tables all appear in `TablePlansInDependencyOrder`.

description: Implement deterministic `SelectByKeysetSql` emission for each compiled table read plan. Acceptance: every table hydration query joins to the dialect keyset temp table on the owning table's root `DocumentId` key column, selects every physical column in `DbTableModel.Columns` order, and emits `ORDER BY` exactly in `TableKey.Columns` order with no special-case `DocumentId` reordering. SQL must remain canonical and stable for pgsql and mssql.
steps-to-verify: Add exact-SQL assertions for root, child, and nested child tables in both dialects.

description: Add compile-time validation for hydration plan integrity. Acceptance: the compiler fails fast with deterministic messages when a table key does not contain exactly one root `DocumentId` key part, when that root `DocumentId` key part is not first in `TableKey.Columns`, when key metadata is otherwise invalid for deterministic ordering, or when future projection dependencies do not resolve to selected columns on the owning table. Specifically validate that every `DocumentReferenceBinding.FkColumn`, every `ReferenceIdentityBinding.Column`, and every `DescriptorEdgeSource.FkColumn` exists on the owning `DbTableModel` and therefore resolves to a hydration select-list ordinal, without creating projection contracts yet.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for missing FK column, missing reference identity binding column, missing descriptor FK column, and invalid key-shape cases with deterministic exception messages.

description: Integrate full hydration read compilation into mapping-set compilation and lookup behavior. Acceptance: `MappingSetCompiler` populates `ReadPlansByResource` for every relational-table resource, including resources with child tables, `_ext` tables, `DocumentReferenceBindings`, and `DescriptorEdgeSources`; shared descriptor-table resources remain omitted. `MappingSetLookupExtensions` must stop reporting thin-slice omission reasons for relational-table read plans and instead treat a missing relational read plan as an internal compiler or selection bug.
steps-to-verify: Update mapping-set unit tests so mixed-resource fixtures expect read plans for all relational-table resources and only omit shared descriptor storage resources.

description: Change `mappingset.manifest.json` emission to surface multi-table hydration inventory explicitly. Acceptance: read-plan manifests emit `table_plans_in_dependency_order` with one entry per table containing normalized `SelectByKeysetSql` hash, `select_list_columns_in_order`, and `order_by_key_columns_in_order`; multi-table read plans must no longer collapse to `null`. Include empty `reference_identity_projection_plans_in_dependency_order` and `descriptor_projection_plans_in_order` arrays now so story 06 can extend the same shape additively.
steps-to-verify: Update manifest emitter tests to assert the new per-table read-plan shape for both single-table and multi-table resources.

description: Update runtime plan compilation determinism coverage for the expanded read-plan manifest shape. Acceptance: `RuntimePlanCompilationDeterminismTests` and related manifest fingerprint helpers track per-table read-plan inventory and hashes, plus the empty projection arrays, instead of assuming a single `read_plan.select_by_keyset_sql_sha256` property. Input-order permutation assertions must remain stable for both single-table and multi-table resources.
steps-to-verify: Update manifest fingerprint readers and assertions so multi-table read plans participate in deterministic comparisons without collapsing back to a single read-plan hash.

description: Update normalized DTO, codec, and canonical JSON helpers for `ResourceReadPlan` so the new multi-table hydration shape round-trips deterministically. Acceptance: normalized read-plan representations preserve all table plans in dependency order, preserve empty projection arrays, and encode or decode the expanded read-plan shape without assuming a single table.
steps-to-verify: Add or update codec and DTO tests that encode, decode, and hash multi-table `ResourceReadPlan` instances deterministically.

description: Expand deterministic compiler coverage for hydration read plans. Acceptance: tests prove stable SQL and metadata across repeated compilation and input-order permutations, stable aliasing across dialects, select-list order equal to `DbTableModel.Columns`, and `ORDER BY` order equal to `TableKey.Columns` even when the modeled key order differs from prior thin-slice assumptions.
steps-to-verify: Add compiler determinism tests for repeated compile and input-order permutations on representative root-only and multi-table resources.

description: Remove or rewrite thin-slice-era tests that now assert behavior contrary to story 05. Acceptance: tests no longer expect relational-table resources with child tables, `DocumentReferenceBindings`, or `DescriptorEdgeSources` to be omitted from `ReadPlansByResource`, and no remaining read-plan test asserts compiler-side `DocumentId` first ordering when `TableKey.Columns` says otherwise.
steps-to-verify: Audit and update read-plan, lookup, and mapping-set tests in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit` for story-05 semantics.

description: Rebaseline the small runtime-plan-compilation fixture artifacts to match story 05 hydration coverage. Acceptance: `mappingset.manifest.json` files under the runtime-plan-compilation fixtures show read plans for all relational-table resources, emit per-table hydration inventory for multi-table resources, retain empty projection arrays, and remain stable across pgsql and mssql.
steps-to-verify: Run the runtime-plan-compilation golden fixture tests with `UPDATE_GOLDENS=1` to regenerate expected manifests, then rerun without the environment variable to confirm clean diffs.

description: Rebaseline the larger authoritative `mappingset.manifest.json` fixtures used by this test project. Acceptance: authoritative expected outputs reflect story 05's multi-table hydration inventory, no longer emit `null` for relational multi-table read plans, retain empty projection arrays, and continue to compare cleanly with normalized hash stability.
steps-to-verify: Run the authoritative mapping-set golden tests with `UPDATE_GOLDENS=1` after the implementation stabilizes, then rerun without the environment variable to ensure no remaining diff noise.

description: Format touched source files and run the full backend plans unit test project after the targeted story-05 work is complete. Acceptance: the relevant plans projects are formatted with CSharpier and the full `EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit` test project passes cleanly without relying only on targeted filters.

Harden `ReadPlanCompiler` so it rejects malformed relational resource models before emitting hydration SQL. Acceptance: compilation must fail fast for relational resources with no tables in `TablesInDependencyOrder`, with zero or multiple root-scope (`JsonScope == '$'`) tables, or when the root-scope table does not match `resourceModel.Root`. The read compiler should enforce the same baseline structural invariants already required by the write compiler so hydration never produces an empty or misanchored `ResourceReadPlan`.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/ReadPlanCompilerTests.cs` covering: no tables, multiple root-scope tables, and root-scope table mismatch with deterministic exception messages.

description: Keep `MappingSetManifestJsonEmitter` as a derived diagnostic summary rather than a second authoritative read-plan serialization format. Acceptance: the normalized plan codec remains the authoritative serialization path, the story-05 empty `read_plan.reference_identity_projection_plans_in_dependency_order` and `read_plan.descriptor_projection_plans_in_order` placeholders remain acceptable until story 06, and manifest metadata such as `select_list_columns_in_order` and `order_by_key_columns_in_order` is explicitly treated and tested as derived diagnostic output. Update manifest tests so they validate emitted data against plans produced by `ReadPlanCompiler`, not the legacy root-only compiler with divergent ordering behavior.
steps-to-verify: Update `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/MappingSetManifestJsonEmitter.cs` and its tests so manifest assertions compare against the compiled `ResourceReadPlan` inventory, treat the projection arrays as intentional story-05 placeholders, and describe `select_list_columns_in_order` / `order_by_key_columns_in_order` as derived diagnostics rather than serialized plan state.

description: Remove the legacy thin-slice read compiler path now that production mapping-set compilation always uses `ReadPlanCompiler`. Acceptance: delete `RootOnlyReadPlanCompiler` and `ThinSliceReadPlanSupportEvaluator`, migrate any still-useful root-only assertions into `ReadPlanCompiler` coverage, and remove tests that inject obsolete thin-slice ordering semantics such as forcing `DocumentId` first when `TableKey.Columns` says otherwise. The plans assembly should expose one authoritative hydration-read compilation path for relational resources, with only minimal shared helpers extracted if needed during deletion.
steps-to-verify: Delete `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans/RootOnlyReadPlanCompiler.cs` and `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans/ThinSliceReadPlanSupportEvaluator.cs`, then move any desired root-only assertions into `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/ReadPlanCompilerTests.cs` and remove manifest tests that currently inject `RootOnlyReadPlanCompiler` output.

description: Restore the distinction between story-05 hydration SQL coverage and a fully executable read plan. Acceptance: `MappingSetCompiler` may continue compiling `SelectByKeysetSql` for all relational-table resources, but `MappingSetLookupExtensions.GetReadPlanOrThrow` must fail with a deterministic actionable `NotSupportedException` when a relational resource still lacks required projection metadata for runtime execution. Specifically, if `DocumentReferenceBindings` or `DescriptorEdgeSources` are present while `ReferenceIdentityProjectionPlansInDependencyOrder` or `DescriptorProjectionPlansInOrder` remain empty, lookup must explain that hydration SQL exists but story-06 projection compilation is still required, instead of reporting an internal bug. Relational resources with no projection dependencies must continue to return their compiled read plans, and shared descriptor storage resources must retain the descriptor-path message.
steps-to-verify: Add or update unit tests in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/MappingSetLookupExtensionsTests.cs` proving: relational resources without projection dependencies still return a compiled read plan; relational resources with `DocumentReferenceBindings` but empty reference projection plans throw a `NotSupportedException` that points to story 06; relational resources with `DescriptorEdgeSources` but empty descriptor projection plans throw a `NotSupportedException` that points to story 06; and a truly missing relational read plan with no projection dependency still reports an internal compiler or selection bug.

description: Make read-plan manifest diagnostics report what the compiler actually emitted. Acceptance: `MappingSetManifestJsonEmitter` must derive `read_plan.table_plans_in_dependency_order[].select_list_columns_in_order` and `order_by_key_columns_in_order` from the compiled `SelectByKeysetSql` or from compiler metadata produced from the same emitted lists, not by re-reading `TableModel.Columns` and `TableModel.Key.Columns`. The manifest should still include the normalized SQL hash, but its human-readable ordering arrays must fail when SQL ordering drifts from the model so goldens remain sensitive to the story-05 ordering contract.
steps-to-verify: Extract or reuse SQL-shape parsing helpers in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit` so manifest emission and tests read select-list and `ORDER BY` columns from compiled SQL instead of re-deriving them from `TableModel`.

Add or update unit tests in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/MappingSetManifestJsonEmitterTests.cs` to compare emitted manifest ordering arrays against the parsed `SelectByKeysetSql` shape for representative single-table and multi-table resources, and to fail if those arrays would differ from the SQL text.

description: Extract the duplicated deterministic table-key validation rules from `ReadPlanCompiler` and `WritePlanCompiler` into a shared validator in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans`. Acceptance: the common structural rules for plan compilation live in one authoritative helper, cover the same invariants in both read and write compilation, and preserve current behavior and exception messages for invalid key shapes. Specifically, the shared validation must enforce: at least one key column exists, only `ParentKeyPart` and `Ordinal` key kinds are allowed for relational table plan compilation, exactly one root `DocumentId` parent key part exists, that `DocumentId` key part is first in key order, at most one `Ordinal` key column exists, and `Ordinal` is last when present. Write-specific checks that a key column exists in `DbTableModel.Columns` and is writable or not a `UnifiedAlias` must remain layered on top of the shared helper rather than being lost or duplicated again.
steps-to-verify: Refactor `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans/ReadPlanCompiler.cs`, `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans/WritePlanCompiler.cs`, and `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans/RelationalResourceModelCompileValidator.cs` so both compilers call the same shared key-shape validation path before their read-specific or write-specific checks.

Add or update unit tests in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/ReadPlanCompilerTests.cs` and `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/Given_WritePlanCompiler_BindingsAndSources.cs` proving the two compilers still reject the same malformed key shapes with the same deterministic messages for: missing root `DocumentId`, root `DocumentId` not first, multiple `Ordinal` columns, and `Ordinal` not last.
